data.title: Banco Santander Chile Files 2025 Audited Financials With Clean Opinion
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Banco Santander Chile ( (BSAC) ) has issued an announcement.

Banco Santander Chile has filed its April 2026 report as a foreign issuer in the U.S., disclosing that its consolidated financial statements for the years ended December 31, 2025 and 2024 were audited under Chilean standards. The independent auditor’s report dated February 25, 2026 concludes that the 2025 accounts fairly present the group’s financial position and performance in accordance with rules set by Chile’s Financial Market Commission.

The audit identifies the bank’s information technology environment and its methodology for calculating allowances for credit risk on loans and customer receivables as key audit matters, reflecting the importance and complexity of these areas for the lender. Auditors report no significant findings affecting their assessment of IT controls or credit risk provisions, which should reassure investors and regulators about the robustness of Santander Chile’s risk management and the reliability of its reported figures as of year-end 2025.

The most recent analyst rating on (BSAC) stock is a Buy with a $40.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Banco Santander Chile stock, see the BSAC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BSAC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BSAC is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by mixed fundamentals (volatile revenue, leverage risk, and inconsistent cash-flow conversion) and weak technical momentum. These are partially offset by reasonable valuation (P/E and dividend yield) and a positive earnings-call outlook featuring strong profitability/efficiency and steady 2026 guidance, albeit with credit and regulatory risks.

To see Spark’s full report on BSAC stock, click here.

More about Banco Santander Chile

Banco Santander Chile is a major financial institution in the Chilean banking industry, offering a full range of commercial, mortgage, consumer lending and other financial services. The bank operates through multiple affiliates and relies heavily on complex information technology systems and credit risk models to manage its large portfolio of loans and customer receivables in the Chilean market.

data.title: Jyong Biotech Delays Annual 20-F (Yearly Report)
data.description:
Jyong Biotech Ltd. ( (MENS) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Jyong Biotech Ltd. has filed a Form 12b-25, notifying investors of a delay in submitting its Form 20-F (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The company stresses that this is a timing issue affecting its annual filing, not an indication of deeper regulatory non-compliance, and confirms that all other required reports over the past 12 months have been filed.

The company attributes the delay mainly to needing additional time to finalize its audited financial statements and related disclosures for the Form 20-F (Yearly Report). Management indicates that filing within the standard deadline would have required unreasonable effort or expense, suggesting that the audit and disclosure work is still ongoing but nearing completion.

Jyong Biotech says it expects to file the delayed Form 20-F (Yearly Report) no later than the 15th calendar day after the original due date. This timeline is in line with the grace period allowed under SEC rules when a Form 12b-25 is properly submitted, and it gives investors a near-term window for when the full annual report should become available.

The company does not anticipate any significant changes in its results of operations compared with the prior fiscal year based on the information currently available. However, it cautions that the final numbers could still change as its independent registered public accounting firm completes the audit, and it flags that all such expectations are forward-looking statements subject to the usual risks and uncertainties.

Jyong Biotech emphasizes its intention to complete the audit, finalize its disclosures and return to timely filing of future periodic reports with the SEC. The notification is signed on behalf of the company by Chief Executive Officer and Chairwoman of the Board Fu-Feng Kuo, dated April 29, 2026, underscoring executive-level responsibility for the late filing and the remediation steps underway.

More about Jyong Biotech Ltd.

Average Trading Volume: 254,242

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $163.5M

data.title: FDCTech Posts Record 2025 Results and Returns to Profitability
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

FDCTech ( (FDCT) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 22, 2026, FDCTech reported record results for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with revenue rising 29.8% to about $35 million and a swing back to profitability at $5.8 million in net income, reversing a small loss in 2024. Gross margin widened to 54.8%, operating income reached $6.1 million, and the company’s accumulated deficit was fully erased, leaving an accumulated surplus and lifting stockholders’ equity to $22.4 million, supported by stronger cash and working capital.

Growth was driven by a 24.6% increase in brokerage revenues and a more than tripling of technology and software sales, reflecting broad adoption of the Condor platform, while wealth management revenue held steady with over $530 million in client assets under advice. The October 29, 2025 acquisition of Seychelles-licensed Alchemy International Ltd. was immediately earnings-accretive, contributing around $6.3 million in net income and expanding FDCTech’s reach among offshore brokerages, high-frequency traders, and institutional clients, bolstering its balance sheet and reinforcing its positioning for a prospective uplisting to a national exchange.

Spark’s Take on FDCT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FDCT is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved reported profitability and a low-leverage balance sheet, but it is held back materially by highly unfavorable and volatile cash flow (notably the ~-$41.0M 2025 outflow) and weaker long-term technical trend positioning. A very low P/E provides valuation support, partially offsetting the cash-flow and trend risks.

To see Spark’s full report on FDCT stock, click here.

More about FDCTech

FDCTech, Inc. is a diversified, regulatory‑grade financial technology infrastructure developer serving regulated and OTC brokerages, as well as proprietary and algorithmic trading firms across forex, stocks, commodities, indices, ETFs, precious metals, and other asset classes worldwide. The Irvine, California-based company pursues a growth strategy centered on acquiring and integrating small to mid-size legacy financial services firms, leveraging its proprietary Condor Trading Technology and liquidity solutions to enhance client execution and service capabilities.

Its client base spans offshore brokerages, high-frequency traders, and institutional investors, supported by regulated subsidiaries including Australian wealth manager AD Advisory Services and Seychelles-based securities dealer Alchemy International Ltd., giving FDCTech a broader global regulatory footprint in developed and emerging markets. This multi-segment model positions the company at the intersection of trading technology, brokerage services, and wealth management, with an emphasis on scalable infrastructure for future financial markets.

data.title: LXP Industrial Trust Posts Q1 Loss Amid Leasing Growth
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from LXP Industrial Trust ( (LXP) ) is now available.

LXP Industrial Trust reported first-quarter 2026 results on April 29, 2026, posting a net loss attributable to common shareholders of $1.9 million, or $0.03 per diluted share, versus a profit a year earlier, as revenues slipped to $85.9 million due primarily to property dispositions. Despite the loss, Adjusted Company FFO rose 2.6% to $0.80 per diluted share, same-store NOI increased 2.0%, and the REIT maintained shareholder returns with a $0.70 common dividend and a declared dividend on its Series C preferred stock.

Operationally, LXP extended a key lease at its 1.1 million-square-foot Greenville/Spartanburg facility through 2031, completed an additional 0.7 million square feet of leasing in the quarter and 1.4 million square feet shortly thereafter, achieving double-digit cash rent spreads that underscore strong logistics demand. The trust also commenced a 1.2 million-square-foot speculative development in Phoenix, advanced redevelopment projects in Orlando and Richmond, refinanced and repriced $850 million of unsecured credit facilities, and repurchased 325,000 shares, steps that collectively support its industrial growth pipeline and balance sheet flexibility.

The most recent analyst rating on (LXP) stock is a Buy with a $58.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on LXP Industrial Trust stock, see the LXP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LXP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LXP is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid cash-flow resilience and a constructive earnings outlook (FFO growth, deleveraging, occupancy/leasing progress). Technicals also support the rating with price above major moving averages and positive momentum. Offsetting factors are uneven underlying profitability (negative 2025 EBITDA) and only fair valuation given the elevated P/E despite a strong dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on LXP stock, click here.

More about LXP Industrial Trust

LXP Industrial Trust is a real estate investment trust listed on the NYSE that focuses on Class A warehouse and distribution properties, targeting large-format logistics facilities in key U.S. industrial markets. The company pursues a strategy of development, redevelopment and leasing of modern industrial assets, supported by an unsecured credit platform and active capital recycling.

Infosys reported its audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, with full‑year revenue crossing the $20 billion mark and growing 3.1% in constant currency, supported by large deal wins totaling $14.9 billion and an adjusted operating margin of 21.0%. Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria, S.A. has filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for April 2026, providing investors with an English translation of its amended and restated corporate bylaws. The latest announcement is out from Mixed Martial Arts Group ( (MMA) ).

On April 29, 2026, Mixed Martial Arts Group Limited announced that its TrainAlta training program had gone live in five UFC GYM locations in Australia, marking the platform’s first international rollout beyond North America. TrainAlta is now operating at UFC GYM sites in Sydney CBD, Macarthur Square, Wetherill Park, Woolooware and Bankstown, extending its structured, coach-led martial arts curriculum into a market with a strong combat sports culture.

The move builds on TrainAlta’s deployment across UFC GYM North America since 2023 and is positioned as a key milestone in scaling MMA.INC’s programming layer across a global gym network. By adding more standardized, repeatable training activity into its ecosystem, MMA.INC aims to deepen member engagement, enhance data visibility on user behavior and reinforce long-term monetization opportunities linked to participation, retention, loyalty and rewards, complementing accelerating usage metrics such as 216,000 training check-ins recorded in Q1 2026.

data.title: Itaú Unibanco Shareholders Approve Merger of Banco Itaucard and Bylaw Changes
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Itau Unibanco ( (ITUB) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 28, 2026, Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. held an extraordinary general stockholders’ meeting online with a quorum representing 92.28% of its common shares, alongside management, supervisory council members and the external auditor. Shareholders approved summarized minutes, the omission of signatures in published minutes and the waiver of reading documents that had already been disclosed.

The meeting ratified the engagement of PricewaterhouseCoopers to appraise Banco Itaucard S.A., valuing its equity at R$51,856,273.27 as of December 31, 2025, and approved the merger of Itaucard into Itaú Unibanco without a capital increase or new share issuance. Upon completion and subject to prior Central Bank of Brazil approval, Itaucard will be dissolved and all its assets, rights and obligations will be universally assumed by Itaú Unibanco, which will handle book-keeping and registrations.

Shareholders also approved amendments to the bylaws to record the updated composition of subscribed and paid-in capital following prior share cancellations and capital increases within authorized limits. The bylaw changes further expanded the permissible size of the Board of Officers to between five and 60 members, and the bylaws were consolidated, with effectiveness contingent on Central Bank ratification, signaling continued consolidation and governance adjustments within the group.

An announcement from Foresight Autonomous Holdings ( (FRSX) ) is now available.

On April 29, 2026, Foresight Autonomous Holdings announced that its majority-owned subsidiary Eye-Net Mobile signed a non-binding letter of intent with the City of Muntinlupa in the Manila metropolitan area of the Philippines. The agreement positions the city of roughly 600,000 residents as a testbed for Eye-Net’s cellular-based V2X technology focused on smart urban mobility, collision prediction and prevention, and road-user protection.

Following the LOI, the parties plan to negotiate a commercial cooperation deal that would include live demonstrations and, if successful, a six-month pilot involving at least 8,000 road users across Muntinlupa. Subject to meeting predefined KPIs, the collaboration could progress to integrating Eye-Net’s SDK into one of the city’s mobile applications, extending beyond collision-avoidance alerts to support critical emergency services, potentially strengthening Foresight’s smart-city footprint in Southeast Asia and enhancing urban resilience in scenarios such as natural disasters and other crises.

More about Foresight Autonomous Holdings

Foresight Autonomous Holdings Ltd., listed on Nasdaq and TASE under ticker FRSX, is an Israeli technology company developing advanced three-dimensional perception and cellular-based safety applications for automotive and mobility markets. Through subsidiaries Foresight Automotive, Foresight Changzhou Automotive and majority-owned Eye-Net Mobile, it offers in-line-of-sight vision systems and beyond-line-of-sight accident-prevention solutions for sectors including automotive, defense, autonomous driving, agriculture, heavy industrial equipment and UAVs.

Eye-Net Mobile develops next-generation vehicle-to-everything collision prevention solutions and smart automotive systems that leverage artificial intelligence, advanced analytics and existing cellular networks. Its technology delivers real-time pre-collision alerts to all road users via smartphones and other smart devices, aiming to enhance road safety and situational awareness in dense urban mobility environments.

data.title: TIAN RUIXIANG Unwinds Ren Talents Share Exchange, Cancels 3.2 Million Escrowed Shares
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

TIAN RUIXIANG Holdings ( (TIRXF) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 21, 2026, TIAN RUIXIANG Holdings Ltd. and its wholly owned subsidiary VitaCare Limited entered into a Termination and Rescission Agreement with Ren Talents Inc., unwinding a November 4, 2025 share exchange that had been closed but remained executory because contingent consideration had not been finalized and the 3,211,010 TRX Class A shares stayed in escrow. The parties agreed to reverse the transaction ab initio by returning 100% of Ren Talents Inc.’s equity to the original sellers, cancelling all escrowed TRX shares back to authorized but unissued status, and mutually ring-fencing liabilities and delisting or compliance risks, a move that restores pre-deal balance sheets and clarifies that no further performance, earn-out or audit obligations will arise from the abandoned acquisition.

The agreement, which became effective upon execution and was disclosed in a Form 6-K filed on April 28, 2026, also provides for mutual releases of claims related to the original deal and sets out coordinated regulatory reporting in the U.S. and China. For investors, the rescission means TRX steps back from integrating Ren Talents Inc., avoids assuming its debts or litigation exposure, and preserves capital structure flexibility by eliminating the contingent share issuance, while the sellers are shielded from TRX’s own compliance and potential Nasdaq delisting risks.
